name: Broccoli and Rice Etuvee
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cups fat-free chicken broth, low sodium
1/4 teaspoon red pepper flakes, or less to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat half the oil in a small, sturdy saucepan.
2. When hot, add the onion and cook over medium heat for 2 minutes, stirring occasionally until softened and lightly browned. Season with salt.
3. Add additional oil if needed to coat the rice. Stir in the rice, then add the broth and red pepper flakes. Bring mixture to a rolling boil, cover, reduce heat to very low, and cook for 30 minutes (rice will remain soupy).
4. Add broccoli on top of the rice without stirring. Cover and cook over low heat for 10 to 15 minutes.
5. Optional: Serve with roasted white meat like chicken or pork.
Variations:
- Squash, asparagus, green beans, bok choy, chard, etc., may be cooked with the rice in the same manner.
Pantry:
- Lundberg Jubilee is a nutty, almost spicy blend of 7 brown rices including sweet, short, long, Wehani (red basmati), Black Japonica. Cooks in about 50 minutes. One cup yields about 2-1/4 cups.
